    net/mediastreamer: Update to 5.1.55

    Add QTGL option and enable it by default, this is needed by net/linphone
    for working video calls.

    Changelog: https://gitlab.linphone.org/BC/public/mediastreamer2/-/tags

    PR:             266006, 266017
